title: Jam & Jelly
description: Amazing mod about jam cooking and other related stuff.
body:
Jam & Jelly is all about jam, jelly, marmelade and other related stuff. At the momentit has an elaborate system for making jams, chopping fruits and berries, storing jams, and making plastic blocks.

![Mod Cover Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46f998b54195f8d66024a214ad5605831acac2fa.png)

If you wanna more jam, chopping board variants, etc, you can check Arboreal Nature Mod that adds new beatiful, natural trees, mobs, fruits and other related stuff.

[![Arboreal Nature link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb219391aa8cf79057f2c736395e069ed3382279.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/arboreal-nature)

[![Ko-fi link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fd32bda2dbe27a0b4100056a8e7f54e83e98f7fc.png)](https://ko-fi.com/almiris)
[![Patreon link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e95a1a4d85b20de6b1f942286f9b43793d1c6dc.png)](https://www.patreon.com/c/Almiris)
[![CurseForge link](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e13c79f563423cc2402a14b79f9cbe456020321.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jam-jelly)

## Future Plans
- Marmalade stuff
- More jams
- More interesting tools
- More integration with other mods
